meta.name: NSE F&O Dual-Timeframe Momentum Scanner
meta.description: Momentum-based stock scanner for the NSE Futures & Options universe. Evaluates Daily and 1-Hour timeframes and generates BUY/SELL signals only when ALL conditions for that side are satisfied simultaneously.

universe.description: All stocks in the NSE Futures & Options segment (complete F&O universe).

liquidity_filter.description: Optional filter: restrict the scan to the 50 most liquid F&O stocks ranked by 30-day average daily traded value. Set enabled=true and mode=top_liquid_50 to activate.

exclusions.description: Skip stocks currently in the F&O ban period (MWPL > 95%).

higher.label: Daily
higher.role: Trend and momentum confirmation on the daily chart.

timeframes.evaluation: Both timeframes must be evaluated on every scan pass. A signal requires simultaneous agreement across both.

buy.description: Generate a BUY signal immediately when every condition below is true at the same time.

conditions.description: Daily RSI (14) is greater than 60 — strong momentum on the daily timeframe.
Hourly RSI (14) is greater than 60 — strong momentum on the 1-hour timeframe.
Current Daily Close is greater than the Previous Daily Close — confirms a bullish daily candle.
Current Hourly Price is above the 50-period Simple Moving Average on the 1-hour timeframe.

trigger.description: Fire the BUY signal on the first scan pass where all four conditions are simultaneously true.
trigger.re_arm: Signal re-arms only after at least one condition turns false, preventing duplicate alerts for the same setup.

sell.description: Generate a SELL signal immediately when every condition below is true at the same time.

conditions.description: Daily RSI (14) is below 45 — weakening momentum on the daily timeframe.
Hourly RSI (14) is below 45 — weakening momentum on the 1-hour timeframe.
Current Daily Close is less than the Previous Daily Close — confirms a bearish daily candle.
Current Hourly Price is below the 50-period Simple Moving Average on the 1-hour timeframe.

trigger.description: Fire the SELL signal on the first scan pass where all four conditions are simultaneously true.
trigger.re_arm: Signal re-arms only after at least one condition turns false, preventing duplicate alerts for the same setup.

schedule.description: Evaluate on every 1-hour candle close during NSE market hours; the daily conditions use the live (forming) daily candle for close-vs-previous-close and the last completed value for Daily RSI context.

reporting.on_signal: Report the symbol, side (BUY/SELL), and the actual value of every condition at trigger time.
reporting.on_no_signal: Report which condition(s) failed with actual vs required values for any symbol explicitly queried.

risk.note: Decision-support only. Signals are alerts, not orders. No automatic execution is configured.
